title: Race condition on `StorageObjectStorageConfiguration::(get/set)Paths`
poc: create table s3_table (id UInt32) engine=s3(s3_conn, filename='root/file.parquet');
insert into s3_table values 1 SETTINGS s3_create_new_file_on_insert=1;
insert into s3_table values 2 SETTINGS s3_create_new_file_on_insert=1;
key_bug_features: Race condition in get/setPaths methods during parallel writes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE s3_table_1 (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = S3(s3_conn, filename = 'root/file_1.parquet');
INSERT INTO s3_table_1 VALUES (1, 'Alice') SETTINGS s3_create_new_file_on_insert = 1;
INSERT INTO s3_table_1 VALUES (2, 'Bob') SETTINGS s3_create_new_file_on_insert = 1;
CREATE TABLE s3_table_2 (id UInt32, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0) ENGINE = S3(s3_conn, filename = 'root/file_2.parquet');
INSERT INTO s3_table_2 SELECT id, CAST(id AS Float64) * 1.5 FROM s3_table_1;
